header.title: Your Network Our Engineering Shared Growth
header.description: You have the relationships. We have 6 years, 138+ delivered projects, and an AI-native engineering team. Together, we turn your introductions into revenue — without you writing a single line of code.

value.subtitle: WHY THIS WORKS
value.title: Distribution Is the Multiplier
value.description: Products are built in months. Trust takes years. You have already earned that trust with your network — we give you an engineering team to monetize it.

points.title: Zero Engineering Overhead
points.desc: You bring the relationship. We handle scoping, building, deploying, and maintaining. You earn on every deal without hiring a single developer.

points.title: Your Brand, Our Engine
points.desc: White-label our entire engineering output under your agency name. Your client sees your brand. NDA-protected. Zero leakage.

points.title: Compounding Revenue
points.desc: Most projects turn into retainers — maintenance, new features, marketing. You earn on the first deal and every renewal that follows.

points.title: Fixed-Price Certainty
points.desc: Every project is scoped upfront with a fixed price. No hourly billing surprises for you or your referral. Scope is locked before work begins.

models.subtitle: PARTNERSHIP MODELS
models.title: Choose How You Grow With Us

tiers.title: Referral Partner
tiers.desc: Know a business that needs software, apps, or marketing? Introduce them. If the deal closes, you earn.
benefits: No selling required — warm introductions only
We handle sales calls, scoping, and delivery

tiers.title: White-Label Partner
tiers.ideal_for: Digital Agencies, Marketing Firms, IT Consultancies
tiers.desc: You sell software but lack an in-house dev team. We become your invisible engineering department.
benefits: Full white-label delivery under your branding
Dedicated engineering team for your projects

tiers.title: Technology Partner
tiers.ideal_for: SaaS Companies, Platform Providers, API Businesses
tiers.desc: Your product plus our engineering creates a stronger offering. Joint integrations and shared go-to-market.
benefits: Technical integration support from our team

items.text: Continuously shipping production software since 2020 — not a fly-by-night agency.
Every project scoped upfront. No hourly billing, no surprise invoices, no scope creep.
Your referrals own 100% of code, design, and infrastructure. Zero vendor lock-in.
Claude, Gemini, and agentic workflows — enterprise quality at half the traditional timeline.

ideal.subtitle: IDEAL PARTNERS
ideal.title: You Are a Great Fit If You Are

list.text: A Chartered Accountant serving MSME clients who need digital solutions
A freelance designer who needs a dev team to build what you design
A marketing agency that needs development support for client projects
A business consultant advising companies on digital transformation
An IT consultancy without in-house engineering capacity
A SaaS platform looking for integration and go-to-market partners

steps.title: Apply
steps.desc: Fill in the form or message us on WhatsApp. Tell us about your business and how you interact with clients who need tech.

steps.title: Get Onboarded
steps.desc: Partner agreement, commission structure, and a direct line to our team — all set up within a week.

steps.title: Refer & Earn
steps.desc: Send warm introductions when you spot opportunities. We handle everything from scoping to delivery. You get paid on milestones.

items.q: How much can I earn as a partner?
items.a: Referral partners earn 10–15% commission on every project that closes. White-label partners set their own margins on top of our wholesale pricing. There is no cap on earnings.

items.q: Do I need technical knowledge to refer?
items.a: No. You only need to make a warm introduction. We handle the entire sales conversation, technical scoping, proposal, and delivery.

items.q: Will my clients know about Trai Inc in a white-label deal?
items.a: Never. White-label partnerships are fully NDA-protected. All deliverables carry your branding. Your clients interact with your team only.
Commissions are paid monthly on completed project milestones. You don't wait until the entire project finishes — you earn as milestones are delivered.

cta.title: Ready to Turn Your Network Into Revenue?
cta.description: Whether you want to refer one client or white-label our entire engineering team — let us talk.
